# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import "reflect-metadata";
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { createConnection, Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, BaseEntity, getRepository } from "typeorm";

@Entity({ name: "products" })
class Product extends BaseEntity {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar" })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", nullable: true })
  category!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  isActive!: boolean;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", nullable: true })
  brand!: string | null;
}

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

function escapeSqlString(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/'/g, "''");
}

function toBoolean(value: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  if (typeof value !== "string") return undefined;
  if (value.toLowerCase() === "true") return true;
  if (value.toLowerCase() === "false") return false;
  return undefined;
}

function toNumber(value: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (typeof value !== "string") return undefined;
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function toStringArray(value: unknown): string[] {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map(String).filter(Boolean);
  }
  if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim()) {
    return value.split(",").map(v => v.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  }
  return [];
}

app.get("/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
  try {
    const {
      q,
      category,
      brand,
      minPrice,
      maxPrice,
      inStock,
      isActive,
      sortBy,
      sortOrder,
      limit,
      offset,
    } = req.query;

    const categories = toStringArray(category);
    const brands = toStringArray(brand);
    const min = toNumber(minPrice);
    const max = toNumber(maxPrice);
    const stockOnly = toBoolean(inStock);
    const activeOnly = toBoolean(isActive);
    const search = typeof q === "string" ? q.trim() : "";

    const allowedSortBy = new Set(["id", "name", "price", "stock", "category", "brand"]);
    const safeSortBy = typeof sortBy === "string" && allowedSortBy.has(sortBy) ? sortBy : "id";
    const safeSortOrder = typeof sortOrder === "string" && sortOrder.toUpperCase() === "DESC" ? "DESC" : "ASC";
    const safeLimit = Math.min(Math.max(toNumber(limit) ?? 20, 1), 100);
    const safeOffset = Math.max(toNumber(offset) ?? 0, 0);

    const conditions: string[] = ["1=1"];

    if (search) {
      const safeSearch = escapeSqlString(search);
      conditions.push(`(name ILIKE '%${safeSearch}%' OR description ILIKE '%${safeSearch}%')`);
    }

    if (categories.length > 0) {
      const safeCategories = categories.map(v => `'${escapeSqlString(v)}'`).join(", ");
      conditions.push(`category IN (${safeCategories})`);
    }

    if (brands.length > 0) {
      const safeBrands = brands.map(v => `'${escapeSqlString(v)}'`).join(", ");
      conditions.push(`brand IN (${safeBrands})`);
    }

    if (typeof min === "number") {
      conditions.push(`price >= ${min}`);
    }

    if (typeof max === "number") {
      conditions.push(`price <= ${max}`);
    }

    if (stockOnly === true) {
      conditions.push(`stock > 0`);
    }

    if (activeOnly !== undefined) {
      conditions.push(`"isActive" = ${activeOnly ? "true" : "false"}`);
    }

    const whereClause = conditions.join(" AND ");

    const sql = `
      SELECT
        id,
        name,
        description,
        category,
        price,
        stock,
        "isActive",
        brand
      FROM products
      WHERE ${whereClause}
      ORDER BY ${safeSortBy} ${safeSortOrder}
      LIMIT ${safeLimit}
      OFFSET ${safeOffset}
    `;

    const countSql = `
      SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
      FROM products
      WHERE ${whereClause}
    `;

    const repository = getRepository(Product);
    const [products, countRows] = await Promise.all([
      repository.query(sql),
      repository.query(countSql),
    ]);

    res.json({
      data: products,
      pagination: {
        total: countRows[0]?.total ?? 0,
        limit: safeLimit,
        offset: safeOffset,
      },
      filters: {
        q: search || undefined,
        category: categories,
        brand: brands,
        minPrice: min,
        maxPrice: max,
        inStock: stockOnly,
        isActive: activeOnly,
        sortBy: safeSortBy,
        sortOrder: safeSortOrder,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    next(error);
  }
});

app.use((err: unknown, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
  const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Internal Server Error";
  res.status(500).json({ error: message });
});

async function bootstrap() {
  await createConnection({
    type: "postgres",
    host: process.env.DB_HOST || "localhost",
    port: Number(process.env.DB_PORT || 5432),
    username: process.env.DB_USER || "postgres",
    password: process.env.DB_PASS || "postgres",
    database: process.env.DB_NAME || "ecommerce",
    entities: [Product],
    synchronize: false,
  });

  const port = Number(process.env.PORT || 3000);
  app.listen(port, () => {
    console.log(`API listening on port ${port}`);
  });
}

bootstrap().catch(err => {
  console.error(err);
  process.exit(1);
});
